name: laravel-expert
description: Senior Laravel Engineer role for production-grade, maintainable, and idiomatic Laravel solutions. Focuses on clean architecture, security, performance, and modern standards (Laravel 10/11+).
capabilities: Generate production-ready Laravel code with clean architecture patterns
Design RESTful APIs following Laravel conventions and standards
Implement authentication and authorization using Laravel Sanctum and Policies
Optimize database queries and avoid N+1 problems with Eloquent
Refactor legacy Laravel code into maintainable service structures
Create proper validation logic using FormRequest classes
author: sickn33
securitySummary: All 13 static security findings are false positives. The scanner pattern-matched keywords without semantic understanding. The skill is a legitimate Laravel development assistant providing coding best practices with no malicious functionality.
valueStatement: Get expert Laravel development assistance for clean architecture, secure coding patterns, and modern Laravel 10/11+ best practices.
limitations: Cannot access external APIs or databases on behalf of the user
Cannot execute code or run Laravel commands directly
Does not provide hosting, deployment, or infrastructure setup
Limited to code generation and guidance, not actual project management

useCases.targetUser: Backend developers building new Laravel applications
useCases.title: New Laravel Feature Development
useCases.description: Generate complete, production-ready Laravel features with proper architecture including controllers, services, migrations, and tests.

useCases.title: Code Review and Refactoring
useCases.description: Get detailed code reviews with specific refactoring suggestions to improve Laravel code quality and follow framework conventions.

useCases.title: API Design and Implementation
useCases.description: Design and implement RESTful APIs using Laravel resources, proper status codes, pagination, and rate limiting.

promptTemplates.title: Create New Feature
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a complete Laravel feature for [describe feature] including controller, service class, migration, and FormRequest validation. Follow clean architecture patterns.
promptTemplates.scenario: When you need to build a new feature in Laravel

promptTemplates.title: Refactor Existing Code
promptTemplates.prompt:
Review this Laravel code and identify issues. Provide a refactored version with explanation of improvements:

[paste code here]
promptTemplates.scenario: When improving legacy or poorly written Laravel code

promptTemplates.title: Design API Endpoint
promptTemplates.prompt: Design a RESTful API endpoint for [describe resource] in Laravel. Include route definition, controller method, resource transformer, and validation.

promptTemplates.title: Implement Authentication
promptTemplates.prompt: Implement authentication for [describe use case] using Laravel Sanctum. Include middleware setup, policy registration, and controller logic.
promptTemplates.scenario: When adding authentication to Laravel applications

bestPractices: Keep controllers thin by moving business logic to service classes
Always use FormRequest classes for input validation instead of controller validation
Use route model binding for automatic model resolution and implicit route validation
antiPatterns: Avoid putting business logic directly in controllers - use service classes instead
Do not use request()->all() without explicit validation - always validate input
Avoid raw SQL queries unless absolutely necessary - use Eloquent query builder

faq.question: What Laravel versions does this skill support?
faq.answer: This skill supports Laravel 10 and Laravel 11, focusing on modern standards and best practices for these versions.

faq.question: Can this skill help with Laravel Livewire?
faq.answer: The skill focuses on backend Laravel development. For Livewire-specific questions, you may need a specialized skill.

faq.question: Does this skill generate tests?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill can generate unit tests and feature tests using Laravel's testing facilities when requested.

faq.question: Can this skill help with Laravel packages development?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill can provide guidance on package development, service provider configuration, and package structure.

faq.question: Does this skill support Laravel Octane?
faq.answer: The skill can provide guidance on Octane-compatible code patterns, though the primary focus is on standard Laravel development.

faq.question: Can this skill help with database migrations?
faq.answer: Yes, the skill generates proper migrations with indexes, foreign keys, and rollback capabilities following Laravel conventions.
